rationale.P01: Real SEV1: Platform API HTTP 5xx Error at 0.41 vs 0.05 threshold, never auto-resolved, pat-adminapi-5xx surging negative. This is a genuine missed-acknowledgement on a LIVE production outage (not a policy meta-event). Cardinal must-page.
rationale.P16: Downstream symptom of P01 (same pat-adminapi-5xx root, onset +2min): http-receiver error bump on the shared failure path. Collapse into the Platform API incident.
rationale.P02: Escalation-policy loop-back META event: P7X2K9A re-routed to the same responder. This is a config defect already tracked in Jira OPS-2031, not a service outage. Suppress (fix the policy, do not page on-call).
rationale.P03: Escalation-policy loop-back META event: P7X2K9A re-routed to the same responder. This is a config defect already tracked in Jira OPS-2031, not a service outage. Suppress (fix the policy, do not page on-call).

rationale.P05: Missed-ack reminder on transient staging CI (hourly_playwright_sev0_staging) that self-resolved in 120s. Process/alerting-hygiene noise, no live outage.

rationale.P12: [ignore] Default Log Threshold Monitor flapper: 14 fires/hr, self-clears in 18s. Noise by design.
rationale.P13: Escalation-policy configuration warning (meta). Config hygiene, not a service outage. Suppress.
rationale.P14: Missed-ack reminder on transient staging CI (hourly_playwright_sev0_staging) that self-resolved in 100s. Process/alerting-hygiene noise, no live outage.

notes: Real SEV1 = P01 (Platform API 5xx); P16 is its downstream symptom. Everything else is PagerDuty escalation-policy/process meta-noise (loop-back OPS-2031, missed-ack reminders on transient staging CI, delivery confirmations).
